Package com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ItemsBag
    A collection of items that can be dropped as a reward.
    IWorldEdit  
    LuckyBlock
    Represents a Lucky Block, which can be placed in the world and interacted with by players.
    LuckyDrop
    Represents a drop that can be executed when a lucky block is broken.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Identifier
    A solution to set plugin-name:tag=value PDC value for all versions even before 1.14, which is not supported by Bukkit API.
    LuckyBlockKey
    Class representing a key of a LuckyBlock.
    LuckyBlockKey.NotLoadedLuckyBlockKey
    A subclass of LuckyBlockKey used to represent keys of LuckyBlocks that are not loaded in the engine.
    LuckyDrop.Execution
    Represents the context in which a lucky drop is executed.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    LuckyBlockType
    Represents the type of a lucky block, which determines its color and appearance.
    PluginVersion
    Represents the version of the plugin, which can be either free or premium (V2).
    SpecialDropType
    Enum representing different types of special drops in the Lucky Block plugin.
